title: Last Green Place
user_prompt: Make a 50-second Mad Max style video starring the man in the reference photo (silver hair, round dark-teal glasses, grey t-shirt): wasteland war party tracks the legend of 'the last green place' to a fortress wall of welded car doors — inside is his serene suburban backyard garden; he waters tomatoes, feeds his rabbit, sips tea. Defiant peace. Premise A from brainstorm.

ledger.what: 11 video shots kling3_0 std sound-off, 50s total (~1.5cr/s)
sound dept: 2 music cues, 1 TTS line, 4 sfx

notes: premise A 'The Last Green Place' chosen from 3-premise brainstorm (first-idea rule); user approved with 'proceed'

war party faceless/distant per generatability law
single dialogue line d01; smash-cut orange->green carries the story

voice cast: Graham (en) for KEEPER - dry unhurried baritone
no chains used: every shot has distinct composition; identity held by Element + verbatim wardrobe tokens
